evals.prompt: Set up automatic documentation syncing on commit
evals.expected_output: Git hook configured to run docs-sync.sh on post-commit, syncing changed markdown files
assertions: sync completes without ML or logging overhead

evals.prompt: Documentation is out of date after a merge, sync it
evals.expected_output: docs-sync.sh executed between commits, target directory updated with latest docs
assertions: diff is computed between correct commit range
target docs directory receives updated files

evals.prompt: The docs hook is slowing down commits, evaluate whether to keep it
evals.expected_output: Hook runtime measured, trade-off analysis provided, recommendation to keep with optimization
